_meta.description: Registry of all available seo-ops workflows. Source of truth for orchestrator.

status_legend.deprecated: Superseded by a newer workflow, do not use

operational_status_legend.primary: Core workflow, well-tested, use by default
operational_status_legend.secondary: Works but narrower scope or requires external API
operational_status_legend.planned: Not yet implemented, do not run

flag_legend.budget_sensitive: Results affected by low PPC budget — cap volume-dependent confidence
flag_legend.requires_live_api: Makes external API calls — requires user confirmation
flag_legend.enrichment_only: Standalone enrichment, does not modify internal artifacts
flag_legend.verification_recommended: Output should be cross-checked before acting

workflows.purpose: Scan local Next.js routes and extract page metadata into a normalized inventory
workflows.scope: All pages in app/ directory
workflows.recommended_use: Run first when site structure has changed (new pages, removed routes, updated metadata)
limitations: Does not read page body content beyond metadata/headings
Schema detection is heuristic
workflows.freshness_sensitivity: low — only stale when site structure changes

workflows.purpose: Merge Google Ads Planner keywords, Ads campaign keywords, and search terms into unified keyword master v1
workflows.scope: All keyword sources except GSC
workflows.recommended_use: Deprecated. Previously used for Google Ads keyword merge. Replaced by build_keyword_master_v3.
limitations: Does not include GSC query data (that is v2)
Theme classification is rule-based
workflows.freshness_sensitivity: medium — depends on Google Ads export freshness
workflows.deprecated_note: Script archived to _archive/. Pipeline replaced by build_keyword_master_v3.

workflows.purpose: Fetch and normalize GSC query+page data for the last 90 days into row-level, query-aggregated, and page-aggregated CSVs
workflows.scope: All bm-klus-bv.nl queries and pages in GSC for last 90 days
workflows.recommended_use: Run weekly or before any SEO analysis workflow
limitations: 90-day window only
Position data is averaged
API credentials must be configured
workflows.freshness_sensitivity: high — GSC data changes daily, snapshot becomes stale within 7 days

workflows.purpose: Fetch and normalize GA4 landing page data (sessions, engagement, key events, channel split) for the last 90 days
workflows.scope: All bm-klus-bv.nl landing pages in GA4 for last 90 days
workflows.recommended_use: Run weekly or before any analysis that needs engagement/conversion context
limitations: 90-day window
Channel attribution depends on GA4 default channel grouping
API credentials must be configured
workflows.freshness_sensitivity: high — GA4 data changes daily, snapshot becomes stale within 7 days

workflows.purpose: Enrich keyword_master v1 with GSC query data (impressions, clicks, position, CTR) and add opportunity/overlap classifications
workflows.scope: All keywords from v1 + all GSC queries not in v1
workflows.recommended_use: Deprecated. Previously enriched v1 with GSC data. Replaced by build_keyword_master_v3.
limitations: Depends on keyword_master_v1 and GSC snapshot being current
Theme/intent classification is heuristic
workflows.freshness_sensitivity: medium — depends on upstream artifacts
workflows.deprecated_note: Script archived to _archive/. Pipeline replaced by build_keyword_master_v3.

workflows.purpose: Integrated PPC campaign review: performance, keywords, search terms, landing pages, cross-source overlap with SEO
workflows.scope: Campaign 23271040037 (NL | Gevelisolatie | Search), last 30 days
workflows.recommended_use: Monthly or after significant campaign changes. Best after fresh keyword_master_v2 and GA4 snapshot.
limitations: Single campaign only (23271040037)
Google Ads CSVs must be exported manually first
No ad copy analysis
No bid/budget recommendations
workflows.freshness_sensitivity: high — Google Ads CSVs must be recent exports

workflows.purpose: Site-wide SEO gap analysis: query opportunities, page performance, page-vs-query mismatches, cannibalization, GA4 engagement context
workflows.scope: All pages and queries in GSC + keyword_master + GA4
workflows.recommended_use: Weekly or bi-weekly for ongoing SEO monitoring. Best after fresh GSC + GA4 snapshots.
limitations: Theme taxonomy mismatch between keyword_master (core_isolation) and page_inventory (gevelisolatie)
No competitor SERP analysis
Cannibalization detection is heuristic (3+ pages threshold)
workflows.freshness_sensitivity: high — depends on GSC and GA4 snapshots being current

workflows.purpose: Single-page deep audit: performance verdict, query fit, cluster fit, intent diagnosis, structural recommendations
workflows.scope: Single page specified by route argument
workflows.recommended_use: On-demand when investigating a specific page. Best after fresh snapshots.
limitations: Single page only — does not assess competitor landscape
Low click volume makes conclusions provisional
MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 required in Git Bash on Windows
workflows.freshness_sensitivity: high — depends on all upstream snapshots

workflows.purpose: Cross-source keyword intelligence review: source overlap, SEO/PPC opportunities, mapping quality, priority buckets
workflows.scope: All 1032 keywords in keyword_master v2
workflows.recommended_use: After refreshing keyword_master_v2. Provides keyword-level decision intelligence for SEO and PPC planning.
limitations: No SERP analysis — cannot assess competitive difficulty
Theme taxonomy mismatch between keyword_master and page_inventory
Low conversion volume makes PPC ROI conclusions unreliable
Planner-only keywords need SERP verification before acting
workflows.freshness_sensitivity: medium — depends on keyword_master_v2 and GSC snapshot
workflows.deprecated_note: Script archived to _archive/. Replaced by run_keyword_intelligence_review_v2.py.

workflows.purpose: Legacy/indexation cleanup review: identifies legacy, disabled, unmapped, and suspicious URLs still receiving impressions or sessions
workflows.scope: All URLs across page_inventory, GSC pages, and GA4 landing pages
workflows.recommended_use: Monthly or after site restructuring. Identifies redirect/cleanup opportunities.
limitations: Only covers URLs seen in GSC/GA4 last 90 days
Cannot detect URLs indexed but never receiving impressions
Does not check actual HTTP status codes or server responses
Does not analyze robots.txt, sitemap.xml, or canonical tags
Backlink data not available
workflows.freshness_sensitivity: medium — depends on GSC and GA4 snapshots

workflows.purpose: Live SERP snapshot for a small shortlist of priority queries (NL/nl, top 10 organic)

arguments.name: --dry-run
arguments.description: Print plan without making API calls

workflows.scope: Small shortlist of priority queries (default 5, max 10)
workflows.recommended_use: On-demand SERP position check for priority keywords. Run before/after SEO changes.
limitations: Point-in-time snapshot; positions change daily
Desktop only (no mobile SERP)
Top 10 organic results only
No historical comparison
workflows.freshness_sensitivity: high — SERP is real-time

workflows.purpose: Keyword gap analysis: compare own domain vs 2-3 competitors using keywords_for_site endpoint

arguments.name: --dry-run
arguments.description: Print plan without making API calls

workflows.scope: Own domain + 2-3 competitors (max 100 kw each)
workflows.recommended_use: On-demand competitor keyword gap check. Standalone enrichment.
limitations: Estimated rankings, not live SERP positions
100 kw/domain cap may miss long-tail
Competitor selection is heuristic
No page-level comparison
workflows.freshness_sensitivity: medium — rankings change over weeks

workflows.purpose: Collect question/suggestion keywords for content watchlist enrichment using keyword_suggestions endpoint

arguments.name: --dry-run
arguments.description: Print plan without making API calls

arguments.name: --seeds
arguments.description: Comma-separated seed keywords (default: gevelisolatie, buitenmuur isoleren, gevelisolatie kosten)

workflows.scope: 3-5 seed keywords, up to 50 suggestions each
workflows.recommended_use: On-demand content research. Use results for FAQ/blog topic ideas.
limitations: Question detection is heuristic (Dutch prefix matching)
Volume data is estimated
No intent classification beyond question/non-question
Small seed list
workflows.freshness_sensitivity: low — suggestions are relatively stable

workflows.purpose: Query ownership and cannibalization audit: identify which page ranks for a target query, detect internal competition, recommend consolidation
workflows.scope: Single target query or small query group
workflows.recommended_use: When investigating which page should rank for a specific query, or when suspecting cannibalization between pages.
limitations: Manual workflow — no executable script, operator reads artifacts and fills template
GSC position data is averaged, not real-time
Cannot detect SERP features or competitor landscape without DataForSEO enrichment
workflows.freshness_sensitivity: high — depends on GSC snapshot being current

workflows.purpose: Verify numeric claims and findings from a prior report against source artifacts. Ensures provenance accuracy and catches report drift.
workflows.required_artifacts_note: Depends on what is being verified — operator must identify source artifacts for each claim under review

recommended_artifacts.description: All normalized snapshots — primary verification sources
JSON workflow outputs — structured verification sources

verification_source_priority: 1. Machine-readable artifacts (JSON / CSV in snapshots/normalized/ and outputs/)
3. Markdown reports only as secondary human-readable support — never as sole verification source
workflows.scope: Claims from a specific prior report or external document
workflows.recommended_use: After any analysis report, especially those with medium/low confidence findings. Also use when user questions a specific claim.
limitations: Manual workflow — no executable script, operator reads artifacts and compares to claims
Can only verify against artifacts that exist — if source data was not captured, verification is impossible
Does not generate new data, only cross-checks existing claims
workflows.freshness_sensitivity: depends on what is being verified

workflows.purpose: Fetch URL Inspection data from GSC API for one or more URLs, save raw and normalized snapshots

arguments.name: --urls-file
arguments.description: Path to file with one URL per line

workflows.scope: One or more specific URLs provided via --url or --urls-file
workflows.recommended_use: Before running indexation_debug_v1. Collect inspection evidence for target URLs.
limitations: One API call per URL — no bulk endpoint
Requires GSC property access with URL Inspection permission
Point-in-time snapshot — not historical
1-second delay between API calls for rate limiting
workflows.freshness_sensitivity: high — inspection state can change at any time

workflows.purpose: Diagnose indexation state per URL using URL Inspection evidence + optional GSC visibility data. Conservative classification into outcome buckets.

arguments.name: --input
arguments.description: Path to normalized url inspection artifact

inputs.description: GSC page aggregates (optional, for visibility context)
GSC row-level data (optional, for query context)
Page inventory (optional, for local page status)

workflows.scope: URLs present in the input inspection artifact
workflows.recommended_use: After build_url_inspection_snapshot_v1. Diagnose indexation issues for specific pages.
limitations: Cannot determine cause of non-indexation — only confirms state and generates hypotheses
Runs in limited mode if GSC page/query data is absent
Does not check HTTP status, server logs, robots.txt, or sitemap directly
Conservative — prefers 'insufficient evidence' over overclaiming
workflows.freshness_sensitivity: high — depends on inspection artifact freshness

workflows.purpose: Measurement integrity audit: assess quality, completeness, and reliability of GA4/GSC measurement evidence per page or site-wide. Determines whether available data supports performance conclusions.

arguments.name: --scope
arguments.description: Audit scope: site, page, or pages

arguments.name: --pages-file
arguments.description: File with page paths for multi-page audit

workflows.scope: Site-wide or per-page measurement quality assessment
workflows.recommended_use: When questioning data reliability before drawing performance conclusions. Use before page_audit_v1 when measurement trust is in doubt.
limitations: Artifact-based only — cannot diagnose GTM/tag-level issues
Cannot determine if tracking code is missing on a page
Post-cutover: measurement baselines not established
Low site volume limits confident assessment across all pages
workflows.freshness_sensitivity: medium — depends on GA4 and GSC snapshot freshness

workflows.purpose: Structured query intelligence review: classify queries by intent and commercial role, identify page-query fit mismatches, SEO opportunities, and PPC containment candidates using deterministic taxonomy

arguments.name: --scope
arguments.description: Analysis scope: site, page, or query-set

arguments.name: --page
arguments.description: Target page path for page scope (e.g. /gevelisolatie/)

arguments.name: --queries-file
arguments.description: Path to file with queries for query-set scope

workflows.scope: Site-wide, single page, or custom query set — depending on --scope argument
workflows.recommended_use: When classifying query landscape by intent, identifying SEO/PPC opportunities, detecting page-query mismatches. Complements keyword_intelligence_review_v2 with intent-focused analysis.
limitations: Intent classification is heuristic — based on keyword signal matching, not confirmed user intent
No conversion data — intent does not prove business value
No competitor SERP analysis
Page-query fit assessment requires page_inventory
Low-volume queries have reduced classification confidence
workflows.freshness_sensitivity: medium — depends on keyword_master and GSC snapshot freshness

workflows.purpose: Local SEO / GBP audit: assess Google Business Profile visibility, review signals, and supporting site/search local context. Runs in limited mode when GBP API access is not configured.

arguments.name: --scope
arguments.description: Audit scope: profile, reviews, or combined

arguments.name: --prefer-window
arguments.description: Preferred GSC data window for supporting context: 28 or 90

inputs.description: GBP Performance API (optional — runs in limited mode without)
GBP Reviews API (optional — runs in limited mode without)
GSC queries for local intent analysis (optional)

workflows.scope: GBP profile + reviews + supporting local search context
workflows.recommended_use: When investigating local SEO health, GBP visibility, review signals, or separating site-side vs GBP-side local presence issues.
limitations: GBP API access may not be configured — runs in limited mode without it
No local pack ranking data available via GBP API
No competitor GBP data available
Review analysis is quantitative only — no sentiment modeling
Does not check NAP consistency across directories
workflows.freshness_sensitivity: medium — GBP data is near-real-time when available, supporting artifacts follow standard freshness
